description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great with office and party wear. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Heel: 3" Upper Ergonomically curved and padded synthetic leather footbed for absolute comfort and style Synthetic leather cross-over straps with a sheen lining on the forefoot to hold the foot in place in style Outsole Durable PU outsole textured in the forefoot with ballerina dancers grooves, and has horizontal grooves on the heel base for ultimate grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
